calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Apr-30-2013 Continued To Aug-06-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lenore Gerard for Phyllis Eldridge.

The Court noted that the Will of Ms. Keen states that distribution is to be given to Gladys Ruby as an individual and that the matter will have to be probated. Ms. Gerard reported that the decedent passed away in Sacramento County and that probate must be open there. The accounting petition was continued to August 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204 to allow Ms. Eldridge time to open Probate in Sacramento County.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-20-2013 Continued To Apr-30-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
